sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمَسْجِدُ الْقَدِيمُ فِي قَلْبِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stara džamija bila je u srcu grada.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient mosque was in the heart of the city.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مَبْنِيًّا مِنَ الطِّينِ وَالْحِجَارَةِ الْبَيْضَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je izgrađen od gline i bijelog kamena.
sentences.translationEn: It was built from clay and white stone.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ النَّاسُ إِلَيْهِ لِلصَّلَاةِ خَمْسَ مَرَّاتٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su dolazili u njega na molitvu pet puta svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: People came to it for prayer five times every day.

sentences.translation: Bio je i mjesto za skupove i učenje.
sentences.translationEn: It was also a place for gatherings and learning.
